sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76844" key="paligko/thsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰλιγκότ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n76844.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">festering</tr_>, of a wound, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0627.tlg009.perseus-grc1:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
